hero.title: Campus Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: State-of-the-art facilities designed to inspire learning and growth

introduction.title: World-Class Learning Environment
introduction.description: Our school boasts a sprawling campus with modern infrastructure that provides students with an ideal environment for academic excellence and holistic development.

stats.label: Spacious Campus
stats.description: Dedicated areas for academics, sports, and arts

stats.label: Modern Classrooms
stats.description: Smart classrooms with digital learning tools

facilities.title: Smart Classrooms
facilities.description: Digitally equipped classrooms with interactive whiteboards, projectors, and audio-visual learning aids.

facilities.title: Science Laboratories
facilities.description: Well-equipped physics, chemistry and biology laboratories for practical experimentation and learning.

facilities.title: Computer Labs
facilities.description: State-of-the-art computer laboratories with high-speed internet and latest software resources.

facilities.title: Library & Resource Center
facilities.description: Spacious library with vast collection of books, periodicals, and digital learning resources.

facilities.title: Sports Complex
facilities.description: Comprehensive sports facilities including indoor and outdoor arenas for various sports activities.

facilities.title: Auditorium
facilities.description: Modern auditorium with seating capacity of 500+ for events, performances, and assemblies.

campusFeatures.title: Security
campusFeatures.description: 24/7 security with CCTV surveillance, access control, and trained security personnel

campusFeatures.title: Green Campus
campusFeatures.description: Eco-friendly campus with lush greenery, rainwater harvesting, and waste management systems

campusFeatures.title: Wi-Fi Enabled
campusFeatures.description: Complete campus Wi-Fi coverage with controlled access for educational purposes

campusFeatures.title: Ample Parking
campusFeatures.description: Spacious parking facilities for staff, visitors, and school buses

campusFeatures.title: Cafeteria
campusFeatures.description: Hygienic cafeteria serving nutritious meals and snacks for students and staff

campusFeatures.title: Health & Safety
campusFeatures.description: Regular safety drills, fire safety systems, and comprehensive health policies

virtualTour.title: Experience Our Campus Virtually
virtualTour.description: Can't visit in person? Take our virtual tour to explore our facilities from anywhere in the world.

contactInfo.title: Plan Your Visit
